'''鈭歞h-r-th-n''' ('''kadharthenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charm|charm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charm|charm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-r-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadharthenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharthenoko|thidharthenoko]] || [[word:jidharthenoko|jidharthenoko]] || [[word:shidharthenoko|shidharthenoko]] || [[word:kidharthenoko|kidharthenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharthenoko|thodharthenoko]] || [[word:jodharthenoko|jodharthenoko]] || [[word:shodharthenoko|shodharthenoko]] || [[word:kodharthenoko|kodharthenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dharthenoko|th忙dharthenoko]] || [[word:j忙dharthenoko|j忙dharthenoko]] || [[word:sh忙dharthenoko|sh忙dharthenoko]] || [[word:k忙dharthenoko|k忙dharthenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharthenoko|thadharthenoko]] || [[word:jadharthenoko|jadharthenoko]] || [[word:shadharthenoko|shadharthenoko]] || [[word:kadharthenoko|kadharthenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
